reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: Trusted by businesses across the region.

review1.quote: We had a tight deadline for our filtration upgrade. Glosfume not only delivered on time but the emissions readings were better than we expected. Real professionals.
review1.name: David K.

review2.quote: After comparing several suppliers in the region, we chose Glosfume. The equipment is running smoothly and their support team responds within hours when we need them.
review2.name: Maria T.

review3.quote: Clear documentation, fair pricing, and they actually listen to what you need. We've done three projects together and I'd work with them again without hesitation.
review3.name: Giorgi M.

review4.quote: The compact design fit our existing layout, and installation was straightforward. Performance has been stable for over a year now. Very satisfied.
review4.name: Elena S.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Get to know our story and values.
about.greetingP1: On behalf of Glossium Caucasus, I am pleased to welcome you and to introduce our activities in the South Caucasus region, which covers Georgia, Armenia and Azerbaijan, with our main office located in Georgia.
about.greetingP2: Glossium Caucasus is a regional representative and provider of engineering solutions in the field of industrial gas filtration and emissions control, helping enterprises adopt modern environmental and efficiency standards.
about.greetingP3: We work on high-temperature gas cleaning and particulate filtration, offering solutions for the energy, biomass, metallurgy and chemical industries.
about.financeP1: Glossium Caucasus acts as a financial and strategic partner in the implementation of industrial gas filtration and emission control solutions across the Caucasus region.
about.financeP2: Our focus is to ensure that environmental technologies remain economically viable, investment-efficient, and sustainable in long-term industrial operation. We support optimization of capital expenditures, operational costs, and overall project efficiency through structured financial evaluation and lifecycle cost analysis.
about.financeP3: At the same time, we recognize that financial sustainability is directly linked to environmental responsibility. Investments in modern filtration and emission control systems contribute to ecological stability across Georgia, Armenia, and Azerbaijan, while ensuring compliance and long-term industrial resilience.
about.technicalServiceP1: Glossium Caucasus provides full-cycle technical support for industrial gas filtration and emission control systems, ensuring reliable operation from installation to long-term maintenance.
about.technicalServiceP2: Our team is responsible for installation supervision, commissioning, performance verification, and integration into industrial processes. We ensure that each system operates according to engineering standards, safety requirements, and environmental regulations.
about.technicalServiceP3: We also provide preventive maintenance, diagnostics, and operational support to ensure continuous performance and minimal downtime across all installations.
about.technicalServiceP4: Proper technical execution and maintenance directly contribute to emission reduction and environmental protection across Georgia, Armenia, and Azerbaijan, supporting sustainable industrial development in the region.
about.story: Glosfume Caucasus was founded with a vision to bring excellence and reliability to the Caucasus region. We combine local expertise with international standards to deliver outstanding results for our clients.
